title: Implement basic Dashboard Overview page skeleton
description: Create the React route and minimal components for the Tiger Claw Dashboard overview page, wiring it to the /dashboard/overview API with typed props.

steps.instruction: Create a React route for /dashboard (Overview page) with a simple layout that renders four placeholder cards: TodaysProspectsCard, ScriptPerformanceCard, ConversionFunnelCard, and HivePulseCard.

Define TypeScript props interfaces for the four cards consistent with the Tiger Dashboard PRD, and ensure the Overview page fetches data from GET /dashboard/overview and passes the correct props down.
Run type-check and unit tests to ensure the new components compile and basic tests pass.
